def positive_service_reads_settings_inline_instead_of_injected():
    rule_id = "service_reads_settings_inline_instead_of_injected"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Service reads configuration from os.getenv or settings module inline rather than receiving it via injection."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
